_source: Five Parsecs From Home: Planetfall pp.28-43
_description: Planetfall-specific combat rules differences from 5PFH. Same 6-phase battle round, but with class abilities, fireteams, contacts, and no Luck.

differences_from_5pfh.no_luck_stat: Luck does not exist in Planetfall. Story Points at campaign level replace it.
differences_from_5pfh.no_seize_initiative: There is no Seize the Initiative roll in Planetfall.

class_based_activation.scout: Move + action (action can be before OR after move)
class_based_activation.trooper_quick_phase: Move + action normally, OR forego move to take one action in Quick Phase AND one in Slow Phase

fireteams.initiative: Single die for entire fireteam. All activate in same phase.
fireteams.formation_bonus: +1 Reaction (3 instead of 2) when all members within 2" during Reaction Roll. Min 2 grunts.
fireteams.members_independent_actions: Not required to take same actions or pick same targets.

differences_from_5pfh.hesitation_rule: Lifeforms and Tactical Enemies without visible opponent: D6, on 1 do not act. Slyn and Sleepers immune.
differences_from_5pfh.player_chars_no_panic: Player characters are not subject to morale tests during battle. They fight or retreat as player wishes.
differences_from_5pfh.retreat: Player character can abandon battle by moving into base contact with any battlefield edge. Removed from battle, cannot return.
differences_from_5pfh.scientist_reaction_bonus: +1 Reaction die per scientist on the table. After assigning, excess discarded. Lost if scientist becomes casualty (next round start).

shooting.scatter_terrain: If LoS crosses scatter terrain, a die roll of exactly the score needed to hit means scatter absorbed the shot. Move scatter from play.

damage.stun_effect: Move OR action, not both. Does NOT knock out at 3rd marker (unlike 5PFH).
damage.sprawling_effect: No actions next activation except regain footing. Forfeit Saving Throw, Toughness -1.

armor_saving_throws.combining_saves: Multiple saves = single combined save one step better than lowest. E.g. 5+ and two 6+ = 4+.

brawling.knock_back: 1" per hit taken, directly away. >1" also Knocked Sprawling.
brawling.exploitation_move: Eliminating opponent = 2" move. Humanoids cannot enter new brawl, Lifeforms can.

slyn_battle_end: Battle ends if, at end of round, only a single Slyn pair remains on table (they teleport out).
